title: T-014 — Register DSL rules output_yield_gate_v1 + allergen_changeover_gate_v1
prompt:
# T-014 — Register output_yield_gate_v1 + allergen_changeover_gate_v1

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §10.2, §10.4, §6 D4 D10

## Goal
Register two more DSL rules in 02-SETTINGS rule_registry: output_yield_gate_v1 (soft gate, ±10% variance) and allergen_changeover_gate_v1 (hard gate with matrix lookup, dual sign-off).

## Implementation contract
Create two YAML files mirroring §10.4 (output_yield_gate_v1: trigger wo.outputs_registered_complete, formula sum(wo_outputs.qty_kg)/sum(wo_material_consumption.qty_consumed), threshold abs(1-variance_ratio) > 0.10) and §10.2 (allergen_changeover_gate_v1: triggers wo.transition.ready_to_in_progress, 5 evaluation steps, outcome pass→allow start, fail→423 redirect). Update load-production-rules.ts to register both. Each rule needs a unit test.

## Files (scope)
- packages/dsl-rules/rules/production/output-yield-gate-v1.yaml [create]
- packages/dsl-rules/rules/production/allergen-changeover-gate-v1.yaml [create]
- packages/dsl-rules/src/registry/load-production-rules.ts [modify]
- packages/dsl-rules/src/__tests__/output-yield-gate-v1.test.ts [create]
- packages/dsl-rules/src/__tests__/allergen-changeover-gate-v1.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given loader runs, when rule_registry queried for output_yield_gate_v1, then row exists with type=gate_soft and threshold 0.10 (D4 default)
2. Given allergen_changeover_gate_v1 loaded, when steps parsed, then 5 steps in order: find_previous_wo_on_line, compute_allergen_delta, lookup_changeover_matrix, apply_matrix_requirements, emit_validation_event
3. Given allergen_changeover_gate_v1 loaded, when outcome.fail parsed, then it returns 423 Locked with redirect_url '/production/changeover/:event_id'

## Test strategy
- RED: write both rule unit tests asserting structure before YAML files exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter dsl-rules test output-yield-gate-v1 && pnpm --filter dsl-rules test allergen-changeover-gate-v1'

## Risk red lines
- Do not change yield variance threshold from 0.10 without ADR (D4)
- Do not omit segregation_required step (D10)
- Do not change 423 status code or redirect URL contract

pipeline_inputs.description: Register output_yield_gate_v1 (D4) and allergen_changeover_gate_v1 (D10) DSL rules in rule_registry.
pipeline_inputs.details: Mirror §10.2 and §10.4 verbatim into two YAML files. Allergen gate has 5 evaluation steps; outcome.fail must return 423 with redirect to /production/changeover/:event_id. Yield gate is gate_soft (flag-for-review only). Loader upserts both via rules registry.
out_of_scope: Do not implement allergen gate API
acceptance_criteria: Given loader runs, when rule_registry queried for output_yield_gate_v1, then row exists type=gate_soft threshold=0.10
Given allergen_changeover_gate_v1 loaded, when steps parsed, then 5 steps in order match §10.2
Given allergen_changeover_gate_v1 loaded, when outcome.fail parsed, then HTTP 423 + redirect_url '/production/changeover/:event_id'
test_strategy: RED: rule unit tests asserting structure + thresholds before YAML files exist
Run 'pnpm --filter dsl-rules test output-yield-gate-v1 && pnpm --filter dsl-rules test allergen-changeover-gate-v1'
risk_red_lines: Do not change yield variance from 0.10
